title: Vanilla Melee Starter Path
author: TerraPath Team
summary: A tiny example guide that demonstrates TerraPath progression stages, boss references, and categorized item picks.

stages.title: Before Eye of Cthulhu
stages.description: Focus on movement, a simple arena, and one reliable melee option before the first important boss.

stages.title: Before Mechanical Bosses
stages.description: Replace your pre-hardmode setup with a first hardmode armor set and at least one strong melee weapon.

stages.title: Final Endgame Setup
stages.description: After Moon Lord, switch into a final melee set and polish the build with the last upgrades.
